title: MCA4R Rank3d
description: This is a stand-alone simulator (about MCSR Ranked)
body:
# Press "G" to enter edit mode！

_After downloading, if you want to play, you need to download the 1.16.1 Fabric 0.19.0 client and the following required mods:  
1)atum-2.6+1.16.1.jar

2)fabric-api-0.18.0+build.387-1.16.1.jar

3)speedrunapi-2.0+1.16.1.jar

4)SpeedRunIGT-16.0+1.16.1.jar_

or you can
https://oneofz1.lanzoum.com/b01d6zldhi
password:52rt

## This mod is designed to allow players to edit a single-player simulator without affecting actual data in MCSR Ranked.  

**This mod is not affiliated with the official MCSR Ranked and does not generate any profit.**

**Players are solely responsible for their own actions, and the mod bears no responsibility for any consequences.**

**A private room mode with up to 16 players has now been added (free solo play), along with a friend system and local replay feature—invite friends at the touch of a button for speedrun showdowns!  
More fun and creative private room speedrun modes will be added later, such as traitor mode or no-inventory creation mode.**
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c00d9fad087ed25d1f25499dc6e0cf75517b6df_0.webp)
![frineds2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c992a6d734cf57f4ed48b0ff2c6201b9b6d84ee_0.webp)
~~------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------~~

# 按下"G"打开编辑模式

_下载后如果想要游玩得要
需要下载1.16.1 fabric0.19.0客户端
需要下载前置模组: 
1)atum-2.6+1.16.1.jar
2)fabric-api-0.18.0+build.387-1.16.1.jar
3)speedrunapi-2.0+1.16.1.jar
4)SpeedRunIGT-16.0+1.16.1.jar_

或者直接
https://oneofz1.lanzoum.com/b01d6zldhi
密码:52rt

## 本模组旨在让玩家进行一个单机模拟器的编辑，而不会影响实际的MCSR Ranked中的数据

**本模组与MCSR Ranked官方没有任何关系 并且也不进行盈利**

**所有玩家的个人行为请自行承担后果与本模组没有任何关系**

**现在添加了最多16人的私人房间模式(免费单人游玩)，添加了好友系统与本地回放系统，你可以一键邀请好友进行速通对决！后续还会添加更多有意思的整活私人房间速通模式(比如内鬼模式或者创造无背包等等模式)**
![PROFILE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/814a5311e834813536015e21167c35233f36c45c.png)
![friends1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f9df944bb12c3e3e8c1513d4b024f89e7c21064_0.webp)
